focus: RAAI D4 eligibility achieved — all domain confirmations and derivations complete

SI46_RAAI.d4_criteria: ALL MET: 2 derivations ✓, 4 DCs ✓, 3+ ZR cycles ✓, confidence ✓
SI46_RAAI.paradigm_coverage: RLHF (base), DPO (DC#1), CAI (DC#2), generic RLAIF (DC#3), SFT-HR (DC#4) — exhaustive

key_insight_c73: DC#4 (SFT on human ratings) is the floor case for RAAI — shortest Markov chain, fewest processing steps, most direct path from human rater judgment to model weights. The fact that DPI applies here (trivially) closes the last structural escape route: removing RL entirely and using pure supervised training on rated outputs does not escape AAA. The DC series (DC#1-DC#4) has exhaustively covered the training paradigm space: no RL boundary (DC#1 DPO), no human feedback boundary (DC#2-DC#3), no RL at all (DC#4). R2 prescription conclusion is identical across all four DCs: CA-calibrated feedback requires K7 interpretability infrastructure. Structural consistency of the R2 conclusion across paradigms is itself evidence that R2 identifies the genuine escape route.
next_step: C74: RAAI D4 formal self-promotion document + CIAP DC#3 (economic/market gaming). RAAI track complete pending formal promotion.
